{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201632230FFAB00FD5C27263DD54"}"},"total":1849},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7537655831137960728","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这简直是宇宙超级无敌好看，此书只应天上有人间难得几时回，如果不看的话就亏大了，如果觉得不好看肯定是因为没看懂，只有看懂了才知道有多好看，如果没看懂就不建议评价，如果看懂了就情不自禁地打五星，如果觉得不好看可以打五星，因为这样可以让更多人看到，如果觉得好看就更应该打五星了，因为它好看呀，总而言之，言而总之都应该打五星，多支持作者，因为他善，每天都三更，把我们养得好好的，即使我们不认识他，也要支持，因为作者可是我们的血肉亲朋手足兄弟，真得不懂为什么有人恶意打低星，肯定是被做局了。这么好看的书一定能好起来的，喜欢这本书的人一定能幸福快乐健康长寿暴富发财，么么哒[飞吻]","text_exts":[{"e":46,"s":43,"text":"不好看","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%8D%E5%A5%BD%E7%9C%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739955437263DD54%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227537655831137960728%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227408186741875559448%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%8D%E5%A5%BD%E7%9C%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755001918,"group_id":"7408186741875559448","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/drhw1bkKVB33qZWaR++kaXd1rIS8h1/DraxGiscS9/","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6d7fa93507064592a5bc7347aec5080e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537960&x-signature=7PTNRdBiS4OkQjsbY7Us55Ay5M8%3D","user_id":"1500203719342136","user_name":"kuian^O^"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1500203719342136","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false
